item.name: Charcoal Eel
item.description:
Fading through bright red to mellow orange, the striped markings that adorn this eel bring to mind glimmering charcoal.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This wavekin's ember-like markings are but one explanation for its name. Thanks to an aetherial gland within its body, this eel is able to generate a modicum of heat─comparable, say, to a smoldering chunk of charcoal.
